tasks.label: Build Current Papyrus Project (Constellation)
args: $projectDir = '${fileDirname}'; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($projectDir)) { throw 'Open a file inside the target project before running this task.' }; $projectDir = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath($projectDir); while ($true) { if (Test-Path (Join-Path $projectDir '.dev/project.json')) { break }; $parent = Split-Path $projectDir -Parent; if ($parent -eq $projectDir -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($parent)) { throw ('Could not find .dev/project.json by walking up from {0}.' -f '${fileDirname}') }; $projectDir = $parent }; Set-Location $projectDir; $env:PYTHONPATH = 'f:\Mod Files\Starfield\Projects\bgBuildChain\src\python'; & 'f:\Mod Files\Starfield\Projects\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m bgs_tools.constellation --verbose
